# viettelidc_ovpc_security_group (Resource)

ViettelIDC Security Group — a named firewall container that holds inbound/outbound rules.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Security Group name.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description.
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID. Falls back to the provider default vpc_id when unset.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Security Group ID assigned by the system (vttSecurityGroupId).
